# teraswitch_tags (Data Source)

Tags data source allows you to retrieve all tags in use across your project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get all tags in use across the project
data "teraswitch_tags" "all" {}

# Output all tags
output "all_tags" {
  value = data.teraswitch_tags.all.tags
}

# Example: Use tags to filter or organize resources
output "tag_count" {
  value = length(data.teraswitch_tags.all.tags)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `tags` (List of String) List of tags in use across the project.
